visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair, wearing white headphones and a white T-shirt, sits in a tan leather armchair. He holds a stack of papers in his left hand and a black smartphone in his right, pointing at it while speaking into a professional microphone. The background features a brick-patterned wall with various character toys and posters. (2) A woman with long black hair, wearing a white mesh top over a black tank top, sits in an adjacent chair. She holds her phone and papers, looking down with a focused expression. The lighting is bright and studio-like. (3) The camera cuts to a mobile interface screen capture showing a map of Taipei. A search result for "Sukiya" appears, showing location details and photos of Japanese food bowls. (4) A third person appears sitting next to the woman, wearing a large, yellow-faced deity mask with blue hair and a purple and green shirt. They are holding papers and speaking into a microphone. (5) An insert image shows four women on a sunny beach wearing bikinis and Santa hats, smiling at the camera. (6) Back in the studio, the characters engage in lively discussion. The man in the white shirt laughs heartily, leaning back in his chair while holding a black coffee cup. (7) A concluding graphic appears with a cartoon character waving and text directing viewers to a YouTube channel.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, 1 female co-host, 1 masked guest in the studio.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One male in a white T-shirt and jeans, one female in a white mesh top, and one guest wearing a large yellow deity mask.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A podcast studio with a faux white brick wall, wooden shelves holding various vinyl toys and anime figurines, and professional microphones on stands.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Primary male voice provides instructions in a standard conversational pitch with moderate arousal. No BGM is detected. Ambient studio silence is prominent. (2) A female voice enters with high pitch and excitement, coinciding with loud, synthesized laughter and applause sound effects that increase the arousal level significantly. (3) A different male voice, appearing somewhat muffled and deeper, begins an informative narrative. The tone is steady and professional. Background cheering sound effects are periodically triggered to punctuate the trivia. (4) The audio texture shifts as multiple voices (male and female) overlap in laughter and high-energy reactions. Transient impact sounds like hands hitting furniture are heard. (5) The conversation stabilizes into a back-and-forth between the speakers. Speech rate is moderate, and articulation is clear. Occasional paper rustling is heard as they refer to their scripts. (6) A short, bright digital jingle plays with high spectral weight to signal the end of the segment.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Explanation -> Reaction -> Fact Shift
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share trivia and interesting 'cold knowledge' facts in a humorous, talk-show style format to entertain the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Brand names are mentioned as part of a trivia context rather than a direct promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media talk show editing with high vocal arousal and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
